name: Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Liston would win the inaugural WBC title on hisrematchwith Floyd Patterson.
Ali got stripped of his titles for refusing to be drafted to military service.[9]
Spinks' undisputed status ended when he was stripped of the WBC title for pursuing a rematch against Muhammad Ali instead of a bout againstmandatory challengerKen Norton.[10]

Lewis' undisputed status ended when he was stripped of his WBA title for agreeing to fight WBC mandatoryMichael Grantinstead of WBA mandatoryJohn Ruiz. Ruiz challenged this decision in court on the basis of a clause in the Lewis–Holyfield rematch contract which said Lewis' first bout as undisputed champion would be against the WBA's number one contender. The court then ruled in favor of Ruiz.[12]
Delaney vacates his titles to move up to heavyweight.[17]
Loughran vacates his titles to move up to heavyweight.[18]
Rosenbloom is stripped of the NBA title for failing to defend the title in a timely manner.[19]
Rosenbloom is stripped of the NBA title because the NBA disliked his "clowning tactics and criticizing opponents in the ring".[20]
Lewis' undisputed status ended when he got stripped of his NYSAC title for failing to fightTiger Jack Fox.[21]
Conn vacated his titles to move up to the heavyweight division.[22]
Era ended when the WBC was inaugurated. Johnson was then awarded the inaugural title.
Era ended when IBF was inaugurated. Spinks would then win the inaugural IBF title.
Spinks' undisputed status ended when he was stripped of the WBC light heavyweight title due to the WBC's policy against fighters holding world titles in multiple divisions at the same time.[26]
Bivol vacated the WBC title to pursue a trilogy against Artur Beterbiev instead of fighting interim championDavid Benavidez.[28]
Zale was defeated byRocky Grazianohowever, Graziano was not recognized by the NYSAC because his license was revoked due to failure of reporting an attempted bribe.[34]
Robinson vacated and announced first retirement.[35]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Tiger would then fight for the inaugural WBC title.
Era ends because the IBF is inaugurated. Hagler fought for the inaugural IBF title.
Taylor's undisputed ended when he vacated the IBF title after refusing to participate in an immediate mandatory defense and instead agreed to a rematch with Bernard Hopkins.[40]
Robinson vacated the titles to move up to the middleweight division. Robinson's title is automatically vacated after winning the middleweight title.[49]
Basilio vacated after winning the middleweight title.[50]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Griffith was awarded the inaugural WBC title.
Nápoles' undisputed status ended when he was stripped of his WBA title for failing to sign a fight against the WBA's No. 1-rated welterweight contender, Ángel Espada.[52]
Leonard vacated his titles after being diagnosed with a detached retina and announced his retirement.[53]
Judah lost againstCarlos Baldomirhowever, the WBA and IBF titles were not on the line because Baldomir didn't pay the sanctioning fees.[55]This fragmented the titles and ended the undisputed reign.
Crawford's reign ended when he was stripped of the IBF title for choosing to rematchErrol Spence Jr.instead of fighting his mandatory challengerJaron Ennis.[56]
Loi vacated and retired from boxing.[57]
Ross vacated to move up to light welterweight.[63]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Ortiz would then win the inaugural WBC title.
Ortiz was stripped of the WBC title after the WBC accused the referee for his title defense againstSugar Ramosof doing along count.[66]
Bass' undisputed status ended when the NYSAC abolished the division.[72]
Armstrong vacated his titles stay at the higher weight divisions.[75]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Moore fought and lost toSugar Ramosfor the inaugural WBC title.
Escobar vacated his titles to move up to featherweight.[82]
Salica lost to Ortiz but the NYSAC title was not on the line because it was only scheduled for 12 rounds. He was later stripped of his NYSAC title for not defending it.
Carruthers vacated and retired from boxing.[83]
Becerra retired due to an eye injury.[85]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Jofre won the inaugural WBC title.
Inoue vacated his titles to move up to super bantamweight.[87]
Title vacated because Villa died fromLudwig's anginaresulting from an infection that spread to his throat.[88]
Lynch was stripped of his titles when he failed to make weight for a title defense againstJackie Jurich.[90]
Paterson was stripped of the NBA title for failing to defend against Dado Marino.[91]
Monaghan retired after his third defense.[92]
Era ends because the WBC is inaugurated. Kingpetch would then be rewarded of the inaugural WBC title.
Burruni's undisputed ended when he was stripped of his WBA title for failing to meet the organization's number one contender,Hiroyuki Ebihara.[93]
